## Type of change

- [ ] Fix factual error or outdated information
- [ ] Fix broken or redirected link
- [ ] Add missing reference or source
- [ ] Improve clarity or explanation
- [ ] Fix code example
- [ ] Add missing concept to existing section
- [ ] Propose new section (issue must be opened and approved first)
- [ ] Repository maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is accurate — I have verified it against the source
- [ ] Any new reference meets the contribution standards in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Any code example is syntactically correct TypeScript/Node.js
- [ ] The change is not stack-specific or vendor-specific
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
